name: Oyster Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook celery, diced fine in water until tender, about 18 minutes. Drain and save 1 cup liquid.
2. Saute the onions and butter over low heat.
3. Drain oysters, reserving liquid.
4. Add enough celery liquid to reserved oyster liquid to make 1 cup.
5. Mix well bread crumbs with poultry seasoning, salt, and pepper.
6. Combine dry ingredients with the liquid ingredients, onions, oysters and blend well.
